title: Reviews from the people who dine with us.
subtitle: Real feedback from our 7,900+ reviewers on Google.

items.name: K Vaibhav Vaibhav
items.quote: The food surprised me the most. I didn't expect it to be this good. They serve dishes you rarely find anywhere — vada curry dosa, paneer keema, soya keema, and a bunch of other unique dosas. I tried something new almost every day, and everything tasted great. The staff is warm and friendly. A place that feels like home, serves amazing food, and makes you want to return.

items.name: Sesetti Prasanna
items.quote: The food at Aaradhya Grand is genuinely enjoyable. They offer a wide range of dosa varieties and fried rice options, which makes it easy for everyone to find something they love.

items.name: Tanu Shree
items.quote: They had mango festival going on. All items we tasted and had were actually nice and tasty. Service is fast. They have ample parking space available. Suitable for all group sizes.

items.name: Veerdhawal Naik
items.quote: Grand Aaradhya on the Old Madras Road (NH-75) never disappoints! This place is a gem for highway travelers heading towards Tirupati or just craving authentic South Indian veg food. Their Mini Thali is hands down the BEST — such great value. Don't miss the Tatte Idli either — super soft, giant, and soul-satisfying! Highly recommended!

items.name: Suresh K
items.quote: Good veg options. Had South Indian breakfast for dinner. They were tasty. Surprisingly Dosa was given first and idli. Atmosphere is great, moderate noise. Highly recommend for vegetarians.
